external_blockers: No P4 production, provider, or deployment acceptance is involved in this compiler repair.
goal: Repair effect frontier generation so broad planning tasks produce bounded diagnostic artifacts instead of RangeError failures.

maximum_patch.expansion_rule: Additional paths require discovered_later evidence before evaluation.

success_criteria: Broad planning tasks can start a repoctl transaction without JSON.stringify RangeError.
Effect-frontier artifacts retain deterministic truncation diagnostics.
Existing doctor, self-test, and decision-engine unit contracts pass.
No source edits occur outside the admitted maximum patch.
